title: Destruction of Special Task Force One
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Geroon]][[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] |conc= |next=[[Battle for Outbound Flight]] |image= |name=Destruction of Special Task Force One |conflict=[[Outbound Flight Project]] |date=[[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. |place=*[[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] **[[Unidentified Unknown Regions star system (destruction of Special Task Force One)|Unidentified star system]] |result=*[[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] victory **Complete destruction of [[Special Task Force One]] |side1=[[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] Ascendancy |side2=[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] |commanders2=[[Vicelord]] [[Siv Kav]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1=*[[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]] **[[Picket Force Two/Legends|Picket Force Two]] |unit2=*[[Trade Federation fleet/Legends|Trade Federation Defense Fleet]] **[[Special Task Force One]]† |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*3 [[Cruiser/Legends|Chiss assault cruisers]] **''[[Springhawk/Legends|Springhawk]]'' **[[Whirlwind (Chiss)/Legends|''Whirlwind'']] *9 [[Chiss fighter]]s |forces2=*2 [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleships]] **''[[Darkvenge]]'' **[[Keeper (Lucrehulk-class battleship)|''Keeper'']] *6 armed [[Hardcell-class interstellar transport/Legends|''Hardcell''-class transports]] *7 [[Trade Federation escort cruiser]]s *3,000 [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droids]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=None |casual2=All ships except for the ''Darkvenge'' |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|This primitive alien just wrecked our entire task force. And unless I missed it, he didn't lose a single ship of his in the process.|Kinman Doriana|}} The '''destruction''' [[Special Task Force One]] was a battle between [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo's]] [[Picket Force Two/Legends|Picket Force Two]] and Special Task Force One. It was one of the earliest battles that showed Thrawn's superior tactical abilities, as Special Task Force One was completely destroyed, with the exception of the flagship ''[[Darkvenge]]'', because it was intentionally left intact. ==Background== {{Quote|Outbound Flight is on its way, Lord Sidious. I have Vicelord Kav aboard, and will be heading for the rendezvous within the hour.''"
"''Excellent. And you know precisely where in the Unknown Regions Outbound Flight will be stopping?''"
"''Yes, my lord. Captain Pakmillu has two separate navigational checks planned for the first eight hundred light-years beyond Republic space. I have the coordinates of both.''"
"''Be sure you take the first one. It may be that C'baoth in his impatience will order the second to be canceled.|Kinman Doriana and Darth Sidious|}} [[File:Outboundthrawn.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Force Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] When ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' [[Outbound Flight Project|launched]] from [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] with 18 Jedi aboard, [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] ordered the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] to destroy it in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. [[Kinman Doriana/Legends|Kinman Doriana]], taking the alias "Stratis," and [[Vicelord]] [[Siv Kav]] assembled 15 Trade Federation warships—two [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleships]], six armed [[Hardcell-class interstellar transport/Legends|''Hardcell''-class transports]], and seven [[Trade Federation escort cruiser]]s—to intercept ''Outbound Flight''. They stopped in the Unknown Regions [[Unidentified Unknown Regions star system (destruction of Special Task Force One)|star system]] where ''Outbound Flight'' was supposed to make a navigational stop. Meanwhile, they were detected by one of patrol ships of [[Picket Force Two/Legends|Picket Force Two]] of the [[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]]. [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]], [[Core name/Legends|core name]] "Thrawn," brought [[Jorj Car'das]] with him, who identified the ships as belonging to the Trade Federation. Thrawn decided to communicate with the ''Darkvenge'', in order to discover their intentions. Although Doriana was willing to talk, Vicelord Kav impatiently decided to attack. ==The battle== {{Quote|On one side were handpicked units of Palpatine's own private army, equipped with fifteen top-line combat ships. On the other side were Commander Mitth'raw'nuruodo of the Chiss Expansionary Defense and perhaps twelve small and insignificant border patrol ships.''"
"''How badly did Thrawn slaughter them?''"
"''Utterly.|[[Voss Parck/Legends|Voss Parck]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]|''[[Vision of the Future]]''}} The [[Keeper (Lucrehulk-class battleship)|''Keeper'']] launched half of its [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]], and sent three groups to attack Picket Force Two, with the rest forming a defensive screen. After learning that the droids had a limited range due to their reliance on computer control, Thrawn had his ships pull back, while moving the [[Whirlwind (Chiss)/Legends|''Whirlwind'']] to another edge of the battlezone. The droid starfighters were soon out of range, and retreated. Thrawn then had one of his fighters repeatedly move into range and out again. Although this maneuver appeared simple to Vicelord Kav, it was really designed for the purpose of identifying the signal controlling the droid starfighters. Once this happened, Thrawn's force moved back into range. They broadcast a modified signal to the droids, which caused them to fly aimlessly into deep space. Picket Force Two, having eliminated the first three groups of fighters, began their attack in earnest. [[File:TFDCSbleedsVultures-BTMF30.png|thumb|right|300px|The ''Keeper'' and ''Darkvenge'' were ''Lucrehulk''-class battleships (an example Lucrehulk pictured) that engaged in battle with Thrawn's forces.]] Once close enough to the main defensive screen, the Chiss ships launched [[conner net]]s at the droid starfighters, effectively knocking nine more groups out of action. Vicelord Kav responded by beginning to launch the ''Keeper's'' remaining fighters. Before they could launch, however, Thrawn initiated full spectrum jamming, thus disabling communication with the fighters. The Chiss blasted the helpless fighters, not only destroying them, but causing debris to block the laser communications that the ''Darkvenge'' was using to restart the fighters. The other capital ships in the task force began to attack at this time. The [[Hardcell-class interstellar transport/Legends|''Hardcell''-class transports]] launched their [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] at the Chiss ships, but they simply launched more conner nets to disable the missiles and cause them to hit the other Hardcells. Discovering a weakness, the Chiss quickly eliminated the remaining Hardcells, and moved on to the escort cruisers, destroying them as well. Meanwhile, the ''Darkvenge'' tried to retreat, but found itself unable to jump into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] due to the [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projector]] inside the ''Whirlwind'', which remained to the side of the battle. At this time, the ''Keeper'' exploded, as the un-launched and disabled droid starfighters self-destructed inside the launch bay. With only the ''Darkvenge'' remaining, Doriana and Vicelord Kav surrendered and allowed Thrawn to board the ship. ==Aftermath== {{Expandsect}} {{Quote|Listen to me. We've failed our mission. Even if Mitth'raw'nuruodo turned tail right now and left us in peace, there's no way in the universe our single battleship could take on Outbound Flight's six Dreadnaughts. We would have no choice but to return to the Republic and face Darth Sidious's anger … and I can assure you that you would wish you had died today, torn apart in agony by the Chiss fighters. ''Unless''.''"
"''Unless?''"
"Unless'', we can persuade Mitth'raw'nuruodo to destroy Outbound Flight for us.|Kinman Doriana and Siv Kav|}} Special Task Force One was completely destroyed, except for the ''Darkvenge'', which Thrawn wanted to analyze. Kinman Doriana realized that he had to convince Thrawn to destroy ''Outbound Flight'' for him, or Darth Sidious would [[Death/Legends|kill]] him. This led to a communication between Thrawn and Sidious, beginning Thrawn's future service in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. ==Appearances== *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[Outbound Flight (abridged audiobook)|''Outbound Flight'' abridged audiobook]] *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} *[[Vision of the Future (abridged audiobook)|''Vision of the Future'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] *{{GamerCite|5|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Chiss}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht um Sidious' Expeditionskorps#legends |es=Destrucción del Destacamento Especial Uno }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Special Task Force One, Destruction of}} [[Category:Battles in the Unknown Regions]] [[Category:Events during the Outbound Flight Project]]
